channel.title: flove making-of — pwa questions
channel.description: New pwa design questions from flove interviews.

item.title: Should flove have an installable PWA button?
item.description:
• Yes, in-app button — Custom 'Install flove' button using beforeinstallprompt. More discoverable, more code. • No, browser-only — Rely on browser's install prompt. Simpler, less discoverable. • Defer — Don't implement yet — revisit after core apps ship.
★ decided: — · ◇ recommended: Defer

item.title: Should flove apps support offline mode?
item.description:
• Full offline — All features work offline. Best UX, heaviest caching, most complexity. • Shell + cached content — App shell loads offline, content may be stale. Balanced, simpler. • Online only — No offline support — require internet. Simplest, least resilient.
★ decided: — · ◇ recommended: Shell + cached content
